/CAL:TO SET RESITUTION HEARING/X:PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE AMOUNT OF RESTITUTION TO BE ORDERED/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL PAY RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF 499,21 TO SEBASTIAN THOMPSON/X:CR-110 ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION AND CR-111 ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION ARE SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,//CCU/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO SET UP ACCOUNT WITH CCU WITHIN ONE WEEK OF RELEASE//CONTPROB/

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN FOR 12-13-21 FAILURE TO APPEAR AND RETURN ON SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT FOR NON COMPLIANCE/DAWT/X: DEFENSE COUNSEL NOT PRESENT AND REQUESTS MATTER BE CONTINUED UNTIL TOMORROW,/BWDNC/SAWD/BAIL: 10000/CONTD: FURTHER PROCEEDINGS/DOP/

/CAL:TO SET APD MTR/ACM/X:ACM AND ELECTRONIC MONITORING COORDINATED RELEASE ORDER SIGNED & FILED/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE ASSET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:DEFENDANT TO REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN THE INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION) UNLES AUTHORIZED BY SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE, APPROVED HOME DETENTION ACTIVITIES: JERICHO PROJECT/X:DEFENDANT RELEASABLE TO STAFF FROM JERICHO PROJECT/CONTD:TO SET & STATUS/X:DOPU IN PROGRAM/

/CAL:SENTENCE/X:AS TO COUNT 2 ONLY:/TWS/CH2:ISS:PROB 1Y:PJ 17D/CTS:17/4019HALF/IND/WS/SAORD/SA2:BENJAMIN JASIK, SAMUEL LESSIN AND TRISTAN BROTHERON/SAORD2/SA3:1240 5TH AVENUE, 41 CUMBERLAND ST,, 56 SANCHEZ STREET, ALL INSF/SAORD3/RESTV/X:HARVEY WAIVER VICTIM RESTITUTION AND CPOS FROM DISMISSED COUNTS,/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CTORD:FINES AND FEES STAYED/CCU//OBEY/ACCEP/X:AS TO COUNT 6 ONLY:/ACM/DEF:IS RELEASED ON ACM FOR ASSISTANCE IN FINDING DEFENDANT A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM; NO CHECK-INS AREREQUIRED/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPSDEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,//TWS/CONTD:POSSIBLE DISMISSAL OR SENTENCE ON DEJ AS TO COUNT 6 ONLY/DOPC/
